title: medicago turbinata subvar. oliviformis
intro: Medicago turbinata subvar. oliviformis, also known as the olive leaf medick or olive burr clover, is a type of plant belonging to the legume family and is a variation of the Medicago turbinata species. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Medicago turbinata subvar. oliviformis include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, which can help alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as colds, fever, and digestive issues. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used as a poultice or added to topical creams for wound healing and skin care.
